# Howard Kessler,DC

A chiropractic practice based at 230 Broadway, Hillsdale, NJ, serving a broad and diverse patient base throughout Bergen County. The practice welcomes everyone from young patients (age 10) to seniors (age 100), including weekend athletes and working professionals. The brand has a community-centered, inclusive feel — approachable yet professional, focused on helping people of all ages and lifestyles feel their best.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Move Better, Live Fully — Howard Kessler, DC

URL: https://example.com
Description: Your trusted chiropractor in Bergen County NJ, serving ages 10 to 100 with personalized care. Find lasting back pain relief and renewed vitality. Book your visit today.

# Your Trusted Chiropractor in Hillsdale, Serving All of Bergen County



###   Our mission at the office of Howard Kessler DC is simply to serve you. We provide excellent chiropractic care to help our patients reach and exceed their health goals. We assess the patient as a whole. We want to address the main concern, but also lead you into a lifestyle of being pain free. We do all of this by offering an evidence-based approach to chiropractic care by utilizing chiropractic manipulation, soft-tissue techniques, therapeutic rehabilitation, and a variety of chiropractic services to help achieve your health goals.


Book Your Visit
Explore Our Services

















Move Better, Live Fully


## Meet Dr. Howard Kessler



Since earning his Doctor of Chiropractic from Life Chiropractic College in 1986, Dr. Kessler has dedicated his career to understanding what's really causing your discomfort — not just masking symptoms. As a Certified Chiropractic Sports Physician (New York Chiropractic College, 1991), former adjunct professor of Anatomy & Physiology at Bergen Community College, and twice voted the Pascack Valley's top chiropractic physician by (201) Magazine (2015, 2016), Dr. Kessler brings uncommon depth to every patient he meets. His approach is simple: look deeper, listen carefully, and design a personalized plan that addresses the spinal imbalances often at the root of your pain. Under his care, patients consistently report moving more freely, waking with less stiffness, and returning to the activities they love — whether that's a weekend game, a pain-free workday, or simply playing on the floor with grandchildren.


- Patient-Centered Care Your goals and comfort guide every treatment decision we make together.

- Evidence-Based Methods Proven techniques backed by science, delivered with precision and care.

- A Lifetime of Wellness We don't just treat symptoms — we build lasting foundations for lifelong health.



Learn More About Our Practice →

— Howard Kessler, DC










## Comprehensive Care for Every Stage of Life


From a 10-year-old's first sports injury to a 100-year-old's desire to stay active, our approach is rooted in personalized, practical treatment plans. We listen first, then guide you toward lasting relief and mobility — without the clinical jargon.












### Pain Relief & Spinal Alignment


Targeted adjustments and decompression techniques designed to address herniated discs, chronic back pain, and postural strain. We focus on restoring your body's natural balance so you can move through your day with ease.

Learn more about pain relief  →










### Mobility Support for Active Lifestyles


Whether you're a weekend warrior or a working professional, we help you recover from sports injuries and repetitive stress. Our sports injury chiropractic treatment in Bergen County keeps you performing at your best.

Explore mobility solutions  →










### Ongoing Wellness for All Ages


Chiropractic isn't just for pain — it's for life. From growing teens to vibrant seniors, our maintenance and wellness plans support long-term spinal health, flexibility, and a better quality of life at every age.

Discover wellness care  →
















Who We Help


## Care That Moves With You


From weekend warriors to seasoned pros, growing kids to active grandparents — our practice understands real everyday strain, changing bodies, and the different goals that come with every stage of life.











### Weekend Athletes


You push hard on the trails, courts, and roads — and sometimes your body pushes back. We help you recover faster, move better, and stay in the game you love.











### Working Professionals


Long hours at a desk or on your feet take a toll. We address the tension, headaches, and back pain that come from the daily grind — so you can focus on what matters.











### Active Seniors


Staying mobile and independent is everything. We use gentle, effective techniques to support aging joints, improve balance, and keep you doing the things that bring you joy.











### Growing Kids & Youth Athletes


Growing bodies need support too. From sports injuries to posture habits, we help young people build a strong, healthy foundation — starting as early as age 10.




















## What Our Patients Are Saying


From weekend athletes and working professionals to seniors staying active, our practice is proud to serve patients across Bergen County. Here are a few voices from the community we're honored to support.












### Finally, Relief That Lasts


"Working long hours at a desk had my back in constant knots. Dr. Kessler not only adjusted what was out of place but gave me simple stretches I actually do. I haven't felt this mobile in years."


— Michael T.
Software Developer, Hillsdale








### Back on the Trail


"A cycling crash left my hip so tight I thought my riding days were over. The targeted care and encouragement I received got me back on my bike stronger and smarter about my body."


— Sarah L.
Weekend Cyclist, Ridgewood








### Playing with the Grandkids Again


"At 78, I figured some stiffness was just part of getting older. After a few gentle sessions, I'm back in the garden and keeping up with my grandchildren. The whole team makes you feel like family."


— Eleanor R.
Retired Teacher, Westwood



















## Ready to Feel Your Best?


Whether you're a weekend athlete, a busy professional, or simply looking to move with more ease, our doors are open. We provide personalized chiropractic care for all ages — from 10 to 100 — right here in Bergen County.

# Individualized Chiropractic Care for Every Stage of Life


At Howard Kessler, DC, we believe that effective chiropractic treatment is never one-size-fits-all. Serving patients across Bergen County from our Hillsdale practice, we take the time to understand your unique body, lifestyle, and goals — whether you're a weekend athlete recovering from a sports injury, a working professional managing daily tension, or a senior seeking to maintain mobility and comfort. Our approach blends gentle, evidence-informed techniques with clear, practical guidance so you can move better, feel stronger, and return to the activities that matter most.



Personalized treatment plans tailored to your specific needs, not a generic protocol.


Gentle, effective techniques suitable for patients from age 10 to 100.


Practical, non-technical explanations so you always understand your care.





















Our Services

## Care That Moves With You


From children taking their first dive into sports to grandparents enjoying their golden years, our approach is built around your unique story. We blend gentle, evidence-informed techniques with a listening ear, so you leave feeling understood, restored, and ready for what's next.









### Spinal Alignment & Support


Rediscover balance through precise, low-force adjustments designed to restore your spine's natural rhythm. Whether you're managing everyday tension or recovering from an old injury, this foundational care helps your nervous system communicate clearly, easing discomfort and improving overall vitality.







### Neck & Back Discomfort Care


When persistent aches in your neck or back keep you from the activities you love, targeted relief makes all the difference. We focus on calming irritated joints and soft tissues, helping you find lasting comfort without relying on medication or invasive procedures.







### Posture & Mobility Guidance


Modern life pulls us forward — screens, desks, and long commutes take a toll. We'll work together to retrain your posture and unlock restricted movement patterns, empowering you to stand taller, move freer, and prevent future strain.







### Wellness Maintenance Visits


Feeling good shouldn't be a temporary state. Regular wellness check-ins help you stay ahead of tension, maintain the progress you've made, and keep your body performing at its peak — whether you're a weekend warrior, a busy professional, or simply want to age gracefully.

















## Feel Better, Move Freely, Live Fully


At Howard Kessler, DC, we believe chiropractic care isn't just about treating pain — it's about restoring your ability to enjoy the moments that matter. Whether you're a weekend athlete pushing your limits, a working professional managing desk strain, or a senior staying active through the years, our approach is designed around your real life.










### Move More Freely, Every Day


Stiffness and limited range of motion shouldn't hold you back. Through gentle, targeted adjustments, we help restore your body's natural mobility so you can bend, reach, walk, and play without hesitation. From getting out of bed in the morning to chasing after grandkids, freedom of movement changes everything.











### Recover from Everyday Strain


Long hours at a desk, lifting groceries, weekend sports, or simply the accumulated stress of daily life can take a toll on your body. Our chiropractic treatments address the root causes of discomfort — not just the symptoms — helping you bounce back faster and stay resilient against the wear and tear of modern living.











### Maintain Comfort Through the Years


Aging doesn't have to mean accepting chronic pain. From young patients building healthy foundations to seniors preserving their independence, our practice supports every stage of life. We work with you to maintain spinal health, improve posture, and keep you doing what you love — for as long as you want to do it.






















## Your Path to Relief & Recovery










01

### Initial Conversation


We start by listening to your story — your daily routine, discomforts, and goals. Whether you're a weekend athlete, a working professional, or someone simply wanting to move more freely, this conversation helps us understand you beyond the symptoms.










02

### Personalized Assessment


Dr. Kessler performs a thorough, gentle evaluation to identify the root cause of your pain. Using a blend of modern diagnostic insight and hands-on care, we create a clear picture of your spinal health and how it connects to your overall well-being.










03

### Thoughtful Care Plan


Together, we design a care plan tailored exactly to your needs. From gentle adjustments to targeted therapies for back pain relief or herniated discs, every recommendation is made with your comfort, lifestyle, and long-term health in mind.










04

### Ongoing Progress Support


Healing is a journey, and we're with you every step of the way. Through regular check-ins, supportive adjustments, and practical advice, we help you stay active and pain-free — whether you're 10 or 100 years old.





















Supportive Care

## Corrective Spinal Exercises


Chiropractic adjustments restore alignment, but lasting spinal health requires strength and stability. Dr. Kessler designs personalized corrective exercise programs that complement your in-office care — empowering you to build a resilient, pain-free spine from the inside out.



- ### Targeted Muscle Strengthening Exercises precisely selected to fortify the deep stabilizer muscles that protect your spine and maintain alignment between visits.

- ### Postural Retraining Learn movement patterns that correct years of poor posture — retraining your body to sit, stand, and move with optimal spinal alignment.

- ### At-Home Care Routines Receive clear, manageable exercise plans you can perform at home — extending the benefits of your chiropractic care into your daily life.

- ### Injury Prevention A stronger, more balanced musculoskeletal system is naturally more resilient — reducing your risk of future strains, sprains, and chronic pain.







Personalized Programs











## Common Questions About Our Practice


We know that visiting a chiropractor for the first time can bring up questions. Here are some of the most common things patients ask us when they walk through our doors at 230 Broadway. If you don't see your question here, just give us a call — we're happy to chat.








### Who does Dr. Kessler treat?


We welcome patients from all walks of life across Bergen County. Our practice sees everyone from young patients starting around age 10 to seniors well into their 90s and beyond. Whether you're a weekend athlete, a working professional sitting at a desk all week, or someone simply wanting to move more comfortably, you'll find a place here.






### What kinds of concerns bring patients in?


People visit us with a wide range of issues. Common reasons include back pain relief, neck stiffness, herniated discs, headaches, and joint discomfort. Many also come for spinal decompression, recovery after a car accident, or simply to maintain overall wellness and prevent future problems.






### Is chiropractic care suitable for athletes?


Absolutely. We regularly work with athletes — from weekend warriors to dedicated runners and cyclists. Sports injury chiropractic treatment helps with recovery, improves range of motion, and can even enhance performance. Our approach is tailored to your specific activity level and goals.






### Is care gentle enough for seniors?


Yes. We adjust our techniques to match each person's comfort and health status. Many of our senior patients find that regular chiropractic care helps them stay active, reduces stiffness, and improves their quality of life. We take extra care to ensure every adjustment feels safe and appropriate.






### How do I get in touch or schedule a visit?


The easiest way is to call our office directly. We're located at 230 Broadway in Hillsdale, NJ, and we're always happy to answer your questions, discuss your concerns, and find a time that works for you. You can also reach out through our contact page — we typically respond within one business day.






### What should I expect during my first visit?


Your first appointment is all about understanding you. We'll talk through your health history, discuss what's bringing you in, and perform a gentle examination. If appropriate, we may provide a first adjustment. Our goal is to make sure you leave feeling informed, comfortable, and confident in your care plan.














Gentle, personalized chiropractic care for your family's wellness journey. We listen, we care, we heal.

# Meet Howard Kessler, DC


A trusted chiropractor in Bergen County, NJ, dedicated to helping patients of all ages and walks of life move, feel, and live better.














## A practice built on trust and connection


With years of hands-on experience serving the Bergen County community, Howard Kessler, DC brings a philosophy of care that goes beyond simple adjustments. He believes that effective chiropractic treatment starts with truly listening to each patient's story — understanding their daily routines, physical demands, and personal health goals.


Whether you're a weekend athlete recovering from a sports injury, a working professional dealing with back pain, or a senior looking to maintain mobility and independence, Dr. Kessler tailors every treatment plan to your unique needs. His approach integrates gentle, evidence-based techniques with a genuine respect for the body's natural ability to heal.


From herniated discs to spinal decompression and everyday aches, his goal is to help you find lasting relief — not just a quick fix. He is proud to serve patients from age 10 to 100, creating a welcoming environment where everyone feels heard, respected, and empowered on their journey to wellness.


Dr. Kessler attended Life Chiropractic College in 1986. He has a post graduate degree as a Certified Chiropractic Sports Physician from New York Chiropractic College, 1991. He has an additional post graduate certification in hospital privileges, 1993. Dr. Kessler was an adjunct professor of Anatomy and Physiology at Bergen Community College 1991-1992. Dr. Kessler was voted as the 2015 and 2016 top chiropractic physician in the Pascack Valley by (201) Magazine.


Dr. Kessler uses chiropractic care to improve the health and wellness in all areas of patient's lives, whether they are having problems with back or neck pain, or just want to start feeling better when they wake up in the morning. Dr. Kessler looks for the underlying causes of discomfort and pain as opposed to just treating the symptoms. Many seemingly unrelated symptoms often arise from imbalances in the spinal column. Dr. Kessler will be able to determine the root of pain and create a personalized chiropractic and wellness plan to suit each patient's individual needs. Under the care and supervision of Dr. Kessler, patients report higher functioning in all areas of their daily lives.


Proudly serving Hillsdale and all of Bergen County, NJ.














## Our Practice Philosophy



Guided by three simple principles that put your well-being at the center of everything we do.











### Care That Feels Personal


Every patient who walks through our door is treated like family. We take the time to listen, understand your unique story, and craft a care plan that addresses your specific needs — never a one-size-fits-all approach.










### Guidance That Fits Real Life


Healing doesn't stop when you leave our office. We provide practical, realistic guidance that integrates seamlessly into your daily routine — whether you're a weekend warrior, a busy professional, or enjoying your golden years.










### An Inclusive Environment for All


From age 10 to 100, our practice proudly serves the entire Bergen County community. We celebrate diversity in age, background, and lifestyle, creating a welcoming space where everyone feels comfortable and respected.















Our Community

## Rooted in Bergen County,Built Around You






















From weekend athletes chasing their next personal best to working professionals managing the demands of daily life, and from active seniors staying mobile to young students building healthy habits — Howard Kessler, DC has been a trusted part of the Bergen County community for years. We believe chiropractic care isn't just about treating pain; it's about helping people of all ages and walks of life feel their best so they can show up fully for the moments that matter most. Our practice at 230 Broadway in Hillsdale is woven into the rhythm of everyday life — where neighbors become patients, and patients become friends.















## What Our Community Says


Real experiences from patients across Bergen County — from weekend athletes to working professionals, ages 10 to 100.




"

### Finally found lasting relief


After years of lower back pain and trying everything, Dr. Kessler took the time to really understand my lifestyle. The spinal decompression treatment has been a game-changer for my herniated discs.

— Michael R., Ridgewood


"

### Keeps me on the field


As a weekend soccer player, I was sidelined with a stubborn sports injury. Howard Kessler chiropractor got me back in the game faster than I thought possible. Truly attentive care.

— Sarah T., Hillsdale


"

### Whole family feels welcome


We started bringing our teenage son for posture issues, and now my 85-year-old mother sees Dr. Kessler too. The practice is warm, professional, and treats every age with genuine respect.

— The Park Family, Westwood


"

### No more desk-job stiffness


Working long hours at a computer left me with constant neck and shoulder tension. The adjustments are precise and gentle — I walk out feeling taller and lighter every single visit.

— David L., Paramus












## Ready to Feel Your Best?


At Howard Kessler, DC, we believe chiropractic care is for everyone — from weekend athletes to working professionals, and all walks of life across Bergen County. Whether you're 10 or 100, our practice combines clinical expertise with a genuinely personal touch. Let's start your journey to better health together.

## Find Us in the Heart of Bergen County















### Howard Kessler, DC


230 Broadway

Hillsdale, NJ 07642



230 Broadway, Hillsdale, NJ, 07642, US










Conveniently located on Broadway in Hillsdale, our practice is easily accessible from across Bergen County. Whether you're visiting from Westwood, River Vale, or surrounding communities, you'll find a warm, welcoming space where patients of all ages—from 10 to 100—feel right at home. Plenty of parking and a ground-floor entrance make every visit smooth and stress-free.













## Ready When You Are


We've designed our practice to fit seamlessly into your life — whether you're stopping by after a weekend game, swinging through on your lunch break, or bringing the whole family in for care.








### First Visit? Come On In


New patients are always welcome — no referral needed. We take time to listen, explain everything in plain language, and make sure you feel comfortable from the moment you walk through the door. Whether you're 10 or 100, you'll be treated like family.







### Flexible Hours for Real Life


From early morning appointments before work to later slots that fit school pickups and weekend training schedules, we structure our availability around the rhythms of Bergen County families and working professionals. Your time matters.







### Questions Before You Book?


Not sure if chiropractic care is right for your herniated disc or nagging sports injury? We encourage you to reach out with any questions. Dr. Kessler is happy to chat before you commit — no pressure, just honest guidance.












## Your Path to Comfort Starts Here


Whether you're a weekend athlete, a working professional, or simply looking to move better every day, Howard Kessler, DC is here to help. We welcome patients from 10 to 100 across Bergen County and beyond — start the conversation today and discover care that supports your everyday life.



Return Home

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/8/2026



Howard Kessler,DC ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Howard Kessler,DC

- Email: howardkesslerdc@optonline.net

- Phone: 201-664-4864

- Address: 230 Broadway, Hillsdale, NJ, 07642, US



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 8, 2026



Howard Kessler,DC is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Howard Kessler,DC

- Email: howardkesslerdc@optonline.net

- Phone: 201-664-4864



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.















Gentle, personalized chiropractic care for your family's wellness journey. We listen, we care, we heal.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 8, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Howard Kessler,DC

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Healthcare / Chiropractic provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Howard Kessler,DC provides Healthcare / Chiropractic through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Howard Kessler,DC. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information

## DRX Spinal Decompression for Herniated Discs

URL: https://example.com/drx-spinal-decompression
Description: Howard Kessler,DC - DRX Spinal Decompression for Herniated Discs

DRX Spinal Decompression for Herniated Discs

# Spinal Decompression for Herniated Discs


### Gentle, non-surgical relief for Bergen County patients of all ages — from weekend athletes to active seniors.


Schedule a Consultation
Explore Our Services
























## Understanding Spinal Decompression for Herniated Discs


Living with a herniated disc can make even the simplest movements feel overwhelming. At Howard Kessler, DC, we believe relief should never feel out of reach. Our approach to spinal decompression is gentle, non-invasive, and designed to help your body heal naturally — so you can return to the activities and people you love.


Whether your pain stems from a long workday, a weekend game, or years of wear and tear, we create a care plan that respects your body's unique needs. From your first visit, you'll find a calm, supportive environment where every question matters and every milestone is celebrated.



- Non-surgical, drug-free pain relief

- Targeted decompression for lasting results

- Personalized care for all ages and lifestyles











A gentle, evidence-based approach to spinal health — right here in Hillsdale.










Our Approach



## Spinal Decompression for Herniated Discs


Gentle, non-surgical care designed to relieve pressure, reduce pain, and support your body's natural healing process — for patients of all ages and lifestyles in Bergen County.








### Non-Surgical Relief


Our DRX9000 system gently stretches the spine, creating negative pressure within the disc to retract herniated material and promote healing — without medication or invasive procedures.







### Precision & Comfort


Each session is tailored to your specific condition and comfort level. The treatment table adjusts in real time, ensuring a relaxing experience while targeting the exact spinal segment that needs care.







### Lasting Results


By addressing the root cause rather than masking symptoms, decompression therapy helps restore disc health over time. Many patients report significant improvement in mobility and a return to the activities they love.







### Inclusive, Whole-Person Care


From teenagers to active seniors, our practice welcomes everyone. We combine advanced technology with a warm, community-focused approach, ensuring you feel supported at every stage of your healing journey.










## Our Gentle Approach to Spinal Decompression


From your first phone call to lasting relief, we guide you through a clear, compassionate process designed to restore comfort and mobility at any age.





1


### Initial Conversation & Discovery


We start by listening. You'll share your health history, current concerns, and personal goals in a relaxed, unhurried setting. This helps us understand the full picture of your well-being.







2


### Comprehensive Evaluation


Using gentle physical assessments and a review of any imaging, we identify the root cause of your discomfort. Every finding is explained in plain, reassuring language so you always feel informed.







3


### Personalized Care Plan


Together, we design a tailored decompression roadmap that fits your life — whether you're a weekend athlete, a busy professional, or enjoying your golden years. No two plans are alike.







4


### Ongoing Support & Renewed Vitality


As you progress through gentle sessions, we celebrate every milestone with you. Our team remains accessible for questions, adjustments, and encouragement long after your initial relief.













Frequently Asked Questions

## Understanding Spinal Decompression


Get clear answers about DRX spinal decompression therapy for herniated discs, so you can make informed decisions about your spine health.









### What is DRX spinal decompression and how does it work?


DRX spinal decompression is a non-surgical therapy that gently stretches the spine to relieve pressure on herniated or bulging discs. By creating negative pressure within the disc, it can help retract the herniated material, promote nutrient and oxygen exchange, and support the body's natural healing process—all without medication or invasive procedures.







### Am I a candidate for spinal decompression therapy?


Most people with herniated discs, degenerative disc disease, or sciatica are good candidates. During your initial consultation at our Hillsdale office, Dr. Kessler will review your medical history, perform a thorough examination, and determine if DRX decompression is right for you. We treat patients of all ages—from teenagers to active seniors.







### Is the treatment painful?


Not at all. Most patients find DRX spinal decompression comfortable and even relaxing. The therapy uses precise, computer-controlled tension that is customized to your body. Many people listen to music, read, or simply rest during their session. You may feel a gentle stretch, but the process should never cause pain.







### How many sessions will I need?


A typical treatment plan involves 20 to 28 sessions over 6 to 8 weeks, with each session lasting about 30 to 45 minutes. However, every spine is different. Dr. Kessler will create a personalized schedule based on your specific condition, lifestyle, and how your body responds to the early sessions.







### Are the results long-lasting?


Yes, when combined with the supportive care and lifestyle guidance we provide. DRX decompression addresses the root cause of disc pain rather than just masking symptoms. To protect your results, we also offer strengthening exercises, posture education, and periodic check-ins that fit into your daily routine—whether you are a weekend athlete or a busy professional.







### How do I get started at Howard Kessler, DC?


Simply call our office at [business_phone] or visit us at 230 Broadway, Hillsdale, NJ. We will schedule a comprehensive evaluation so you can meet Dr. Kessler, discuss your symptoms, and learn whether DRX spinal decompression is the right path for your recovery. We proudly serve patients throughout Bergen County.








### Ready to find relief?


Schedule your consultation today and take the first step toward a healthier spine.


Book Your Evaluation
















## Ready to Find Relief from Herniated Disc Pain?


Take the first step toward a more comfortable, active life. Our gentle, non-surgical spinal decompression therapy is designed to help your body heal naturally — and we're here to support you every step of the way. Whether you're just starting to explore your options or you're ready to schedule, we welcome you with warmth and expert care.

## How Spinal Decompression May Help Chronic Low Back Pain

URL: https://example.com/blog/spinal-decompression-low-back-pain
Description: An educational overview of how spinal decompression may support patients dealing with chronic low back pain related to disc issues and nerve irritation.

How Spinal Decompression May Help Chronic Low Back Pain

# How Spinal Decompression May Help Chronic Low Back Pain


June 15, 2025
·
5 min read





Chronic low back pain is one of the most common reasons people seek care at our Hillsdale practice. It can make everyday activities — bending to tie your shoes, lifting a grandchild, or simply sitting through a meeting — feel like a challenge. For many patients, the frustration isn’t just the pain itself, but the feeling that they’ve tried everything and nothing has offered lasting relief.



At Howard Kessler, DC, we see patients from every walk of life: teenagers navigating sports injuries, weekend warriors pushing their limits, busy professionals hunched over desks, and seniors determined to stay active well into their golden years. Spinal decompression is one of the gentle, non-invasive therapies we offer that can make a meaningful difference for people dealing with persistent back pain.


## What Is Spinal Decompression?



Spinal decompression is a non-surgical treatment designed to relieve pressure on the spinal discs and nerves. It works by gently stretching the spine, creating negative pressure within the discs. This negative pressure can help retract herniated or bulging disc material, allowing oxygen, water, and nutrient-rich fluids to flow back into the disc and promote healing.



Unlike surgical decompression, the non-surgical approach we use is comfortable, controlled, and performed while you lie fully clothed on a specialized table. Most patients find the experience deeply relaxing — some even fall asleep during their session.


## Who Can Benefit from Spinal Decompression?



Because our practice serves such a broad patient base throughout Bergen County, we’ve seen spinal decompression help a remarkably diverse group of people. It may be appropriate for individuals experiencing:



Herniated or bulging discs that cause radiating pain down the leg, often called sciatica. Degenerative disc disease, where the cushioning between vertebrae has worn down over time. Posterior facet syndrome, a condition affecting the small joints at the back of the spine. And even for some patients who have been told surgery is their only option, decompression can offer a conservative path worth exploring first.



We always begin with a thorough evaluation — including a detailed health history and, when appropriate, imaging — to determine whether spinal decompression is right for you. Every treatment plan is tailored to the individual, because we know a 17-year-old athlete and an 85-year-old gardener have very different bodies and goals.


## What Does a Session Feel Like?



One of the questions we hear most often is, “Will it hurt?” The answer is almost always no. Spinal decompression is gentle by design. You’ll feel a slow, rhythmic stretching sensation in your lower back — never sudden, never forceful. The table is programmed to cycle through periods of gentle tension and relaxation, allowing your muscles to stay at ease throughout the treatment.



A typical session lasts about 30 to 45 minutes, and many patients notice a sense of relief even after their first visit. That said, lasting results usually come from a series of treatments combined with supportive care like chiropractic adjustments, targeted exercises, and lifestyle guidance.


## A Community-Centered Approach to Back Pain



What sets our practice apart isn’t just the technology — it’s the philosophy. We believe that healthcare should feel personal, not transactional. When you walk through our doors at 230 Broadway, you’re not a case number. You’re a neighbor, a parent, a person with a life you want to get back to fully.



We take time to listen, to explain your options in plain language, and to celebrate every milestone with you — whether that’s playing a full round of golf without pain or simply sleeping through the night for the first time in months. Chronic low back pain doesn’t have to be your new normal, and you don’t have to face it alone.



If you’ve been wondering whether spinal decompression might be right for you, we invite you to reach out. Let’s have a conversation — no pressure, no obligation — just honest, compassionate guidance from a team that truly cares about helping you feel your best.





Share:

## Sciatica Symptoms: When to Seek Conservative Care

URL: https://example.com/blog/sciatica-symptoms-conservative-care
Description: A practical guide to common sciatica symptoms, potential causes, and when conservative chiropractic care may be worth exploring.

Sciatica Symptoms: When to Seek Conservative Care














































Skip to main content















- Home
- Services
- About
- DRX
- BlogDecompression
- Sciatica
- Posture
- First Visit



Contact








← Back to Blog



Share:

























# How Spinal Decompression May Help Chronic Low Back Pain


June 15, 2025
·
5 min read






That deep, radiating ache traveling from your lower back down through your buttock and leg can stop you in your tracks. Sciatica affects millions of people every year, yet the path to relief often feels confusing. At Howard Kessler, DC, we believe understanding your symptoms is the first step toward reclaiming your comfort and mobility. Here is what you need to know about sciatica—and when conservative chiropractic care may be the right choice for you.



## What Sciatica Actually Feels Like


Sciatica is not a condition itself but a symptom of an underlying issue involving the sciatic nerve, the largest nerve in the body. Patients often describe it as a shooting or burning pain that starts in the lower spine and travels through the hip, buttock, and down one leg. Some people experience numbness, tingling, or a sensation like pins and needles. The discomfort can range from a mild ache to a sharp, almost electrical jolt that makes standing or walking difficult. Recognizing these sensations early helps you make informed decisions about seeking care.



## Common Triggers and Risk Factors


Sciatica can flare up for a variety of reasons. A herniated disc pressing on the nerve root is among the most frequent causes. Spinal stenosis, or a narrowing of the spinal canal, can also create pressure that radiates down the leg. Less common but still significant triggers include muscle spasms in the piriformis muscle deep in the buttock, or even pregnancy-related changes in pelvic alignment. Risk factors such as prolonged sitting, heavy lifting with poor mechanics, and age-related wear and tear can all increase your likelihood of developing sciatic pain.



## When to Consider Conservative Chiropractic Care


Many people assume surgery is inevitable once they hear the word "sciatica," but the reality is far more hopeful. Conservative, non-invasive treatments are effective for the vast majority of patients. If your pain is manageable, if you are not experiencing progressive leg weakness, and if you can still perform most daily activities with some modification, chiropractic care is an excellent first step. Our approach focuses on gentle spinal adjustments to restore proper alignment, reduce nerve irritation, and create the space your body needs to heal naturally.



## Red Flags That Require Immediate Attention


While conservative care is appropriate for most people, certain symptoms should prompt an urgent medical evaluation. Sudden loss of bladder or bowel control, progressive numbness in the saddle area, or severe weakness that causes your foot to drag when walking are all signs that require immediate attention. These "red flag" symptoms, though rare, indicate a more serious compression that may need emergency intervention. If you are ever unsure, we encourage you to err on the side of caution and seek a prompt assessment.



## What to Expect During Your First Visit


Walking into a new healthcare practice can feel intimidating, so we have designed our initial consultation to be unhurried and conversational. You will sit down with Dr. Kessler to discuss your symptoms, health history, and personal goals. A thorough physical and neurological exam helps pinpoint the source of your discomfort. If imaging such as X-rays is needed, we coordinate that seamlessly. By the end of your first visit, you will have a clear understanding of what is causing your pain and a personalized plan to move forward. Our patients range from ten years old to one hundred, and every plan is built around the individual, not just the diagnosis.



## Supporting Your Recovery at Home


Healing from sciatica is a partnership. Alongside your in-office adjustments, small daily habits can make a meaningful difference. Gentle stretching, particularly for the hamstrings and lower back, helps maintain flexibility. Applying ice during the first 48 hours of a flare-up can reduce inflammation, while heat later encourages blood flow and relaxation. Mindful posture—whether you are sitting at a desk, driving, or lifting groceries—protects the progress you make between visits. We will guide you through these strategies so you feel empowered, not overwhelmed.



Sciatica can feel isolating, but you do not have to navigate it alone. At our practice on Broadway in Hillsdale, we have had the privilege of helping Bergen County neighbors of all ages and lifestyles find relief without surgery or heavy medication. If you are ready to explore a conservative path forward, we are here to listen and support you every step of the way.

## Desk Posture and Back Strain: Small Changes That Matter

URL: https://example.com/blog/desk-posture-back-strain
Description: Learn how desk posture, screen position, and simple movement habits can influence neck and back strain during the workday.

Desk Posture and Back Strain: Small Changes That Matter














































Skip to main content















- Home
- Services
- About
- DRX
- BlogDecompression
- Sciatica
- Posture
- First Visit



Contact









← Back to Blog



Share on:

























# How Spinal Decompression May Help Chronic Low Back Pain


June 15, 2025
·
5 min read






In our practice at Howard Kessler, DC, we see patients from every walk of life — from high school students hunched over homework to retirees enjoying their golden years. And there is one common thread that ties so many of their stories together: the hours spent sitting at a desk. Whether you are working from home, commuting to an office in Bergen County, or simply spending too much time scrolling on a tablet, the way you sit matters more than you might think.



Poor desk posture is not just about slouching. It is a slow, cumulative stressor that can lead to chronic back strain, neck tension, headaches, and even nerve impingement. The good news? You do not need a complete lifestyle overhaul to feel better. Small, intentional changes can create a ripple effect of relief throughout your body.


## Why Your Desk Setup Is a Health Decision


Think of your workstation as an extension of your spine. When your chair is too low, your monitor is off-center, or your keyboard sits at an awkward angle, your musculoskeletal system compensates — often in ways that strain the very structures chiropractic care works to protect. Over time, these compensations become habits, and those habits become pain.



At Howard Kessler, DC, we approach posture not as a rigid set of rules but as a dynamic, personal practice. The goal is not to sit perfectly still for eight hours. It is to create an environment where your body can move, breathe, and rest in alignment.


## Three Small Adjustments You Can Make Today


1. Elevate Your Screen to Eye Level. Your gaze should fall naturally on the top third of your monitor. If you are looking down, your cervical spine bears extra weight — up to 60 pounds of additional pressure for every inch your head tilts forward. A simple stack of books or an adjustable stand can make a world of difference.



2. Support Your Lower Back. The natural curve of your lumbar spine needs gentle reinforcement. If your chair lacks built-in support, a rolled towel or a small cushion placed in the small of your back can help maintain that healthy arch and reduce disc pressure throughout the day.



3. Ground Your Feet. When your feet dangle or tuck under your chair, your pelvis tilts and your entire spinal alignment shifts. Adjust your seat height so both feet rest flat on the floor, with your knees at roughly a 90-degree angle. This stable base supports everything above it.


## Movement Is the Missing Ingredient


Even the most ergonomic setup is not a substitute for regular movement. Our bodies are designed for motion, not static holding patterns. We encourage patients to adopt the 30-30 rule: for every 30 minutes of sitting, take at least 30 seconds to stand, stretch, or walk. Set a gentle reminder on your phone or computer — your spine will thank you.



Incorporating micro-breaks throughout your day helps reset muscle tension, improves circulation, and gives your intervertebral discs a chance to rehydrate. These small pauses are especially important for our weekend warrior patients and working professionals who may go from a desk chair straight to high-intensity activity.


## When to Seek Chiropractic Support


While ergonomic adjustments and movement habits are powerful tools, persistent back strain may indicate underlying misalignments that need professional attention. If you experience recurring stiffness, sharp pain with certain movements, or numbness that travels down your arms or legs, it is time to have a conversation with your chiropractor.



At our Hillsdale office on Broadway, we serve a wonderfully diverse community — from 10-year-olds getting their first sports physicals to centenarians who inspire us every day. No matter where you are on that spectrum, we meet you with personalized care that respects your body's unique story. Because feeling better should never feel out of reach.



Remember: your desk is just one part of your life. With a few mindful tweaks and the right support team, you can turn it from a source of strain into a foundation for wellness.





Share on:

# How Spinal Decompression May Help Chronic Low Back Pain


June 15, 2025
·
5 min read






Walking into a new healthcare office for the first time can feel a little uncertain, but at Howard Kessler, DC, we believe that understanding what lies ahead makes all the difference. Whether you are a weekend athlete nursing a strain, a working professional dealing with desk-related stiffness, or a senior hoping to stay active and mobile, our goal is to make your first visit comfortable, informative, and genuinely reassuring.



Our practice at 230 Broadway in Hillsdale serves a wonderfully broad and diverse patient base throughout Bergen County — from young patients around age ten to vibrant seniors approaching one hundred. That inclusive, community-centered philosophy shapes every part of your experience, starting the moment you walk through our door.


## Arrival and Paperwork


When you arrive, you will be greeted by our friendly front-desk team, who will help you settle in. We ask that you arrive about fifteen minutes early to complete your new-patient intake forms, unless you have already filled them out online through our secure patient portal. The paperwork covers your health history, current concerns, and any previous injuries or surgeries — all of which help us build a complete picture of your health before we even begin.



We intentionally keep our waiting area calm and unhurried. Soft neutral tones, comfortable seating, and gentle lighting replace the sterile, anxious atmosphere that some people associate with medical offices. You are welcome to enjoy a cup of herbal tea while you wait.


## Your One-on-One Consultation


Once your paperwork is complete, Dr. Howard Kessler will meet with you privately in a consultation room. This is a conversation, not an interrogation. He will listen carefully to your story — what brought you in, what symptoms you are experiencing, how long they have been bothering you, and what activities or movements make them better or worse. He will also ask about your lifestyle, occupation, and personal wellness goals, because chiropractic care is never one-size-fits-all.



This conversation often reveals important clues. For example, a runner with recurring knee discomfort may have underlying pelvic imbalance, while a grandparent struggling to lift a toddler might benefit from gentle spinal mobilization combined with core-strengthening advice. Dr. Kessler takes the time to connect the dots so your care plan addresses the root cause, not just the surface symptom.


## Physical Examination


After the consultation, Dr. Kessler will perform a thorough but gentle physical examination. This typically includes posture assessment, range-of-motion testing, orthopedic and neurological evaluations, and palpation of the spine and surrounding muscles. The examination is designed to identify areas of restricted movement, muscle tension, and nerve irritation.



You will never be rushed through this step. If at any point you feel discomfort or have questions, simply speak up. Our practice is built on open communication, and your comfort is always the priority. Depending on your specific situation, Dr. Kessler may recommend on-site digital X-rays to gain deeper insight into your spinal alignment and rule out any underlying conditions that require special consideration.


## Report of Findings and Personalized Care Plan


In many cases, Dr. Kessler will review his initial findings with you during this same visit. He will explain what he observed, answer your questions in plain, jargon-free language, and outline a personalized care plan tailored to your needs and goals. This plan may include a recommended schedule of chiropractic adjustments, therapeutic exercises, lifestyle modifications, and ergonomic advice for your workplace or home.



If X-rays were taken, a more detailed report of findings may be scheduled for a follow-up appointment, ensuring that every recommendation is grounded in a complete understanding of your spinal health.


## Your First Adjustment (When Appropriate)


For many patients, the first visit includes an initial chiropractic adjustment, provided that Dr. Kessler determines it is safe and appropriate based on the examination. The adjustment itself is precise and controlled — a quick, gentle movement applied to a specific joint to restore proper motion and reduce nerve interference. Patients often describe a sense of relief, lightness, or improved mobility immediately afterward.



Dr. Kessler uses a variety of techniques suited to different ages and body types, from low-force instrument-assisted methods to traditional hands-on adjustments. He will explain what he is going to do before he does it, so there are no surprises. Many of our senior patients and younger patients alike tell us they were pleasantly surprised by how gentle and effective the adjustment felt.


## Before You Leave


At the end of your visit, our team will help you schedule any follow-up appointments, review your care plan, and answer any remaining questions about insurance, payment options, or at-home recommendations. You will leave with a clear understanding of the next steps and the confidence that you are in caring, experienced hands.



Our practice is more than a clinic — it is a community resource for lifelong wellness. Whether you are seeking relief from pain, recovering from an injury, or simply striving to feel your best, Howard Kessler, DC is here to walk alongside you on that journey.
